languages.text: {n}Крупное лицо полковника прорезает хищная ухмылка.{/n} "Что-то вроде огромной лианы-переростка? Это все Погонщица. Гадкая тварь взяла Клеть в осаду".
{n}A predatory grin cracks across the colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."
languages.original_text: {n}Крупное лицо полковника прорезает хищная ухмылка.{/n} "Что-то вроде огромной лианы-переростка? Это все Погонщица. Гадкая тварь взяла Клеть в осаду".

traits.locale_text: {n}A predatory grin splits across the Colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."
{n}A predatory grin cracks across the Colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."
"Let me guess, {name}. Some sort of huge, overgrown green vines? That was the Drover. The ugly thing has all of Tsar-Cage under siege."
{n}A predatory grin carves its way across the Colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown green vines? That was the Drover. The ugly thing has all of the Cage under siege."
{n}A predatory grin cracks across the Colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."
{n}A predatory grin splits across the Colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."
{n}A predatory grin cracks across the colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."

languages.text: 「推測してみましょう、{name}。巨大で、蔓が絡み合った緑色の何かでしょうか。それがドローバーです。醜いそのものがツァー・ケージを包囲しています」
languages.original_text: "Let me guess, {name}. Some sort of huge, overgrown green vines? That was the Drover. The ugly thing has all of Tsar-Cage under siege."

traits.locale_text: 「推測してみましょう、{name}。巨大で、蔓が絡み合った緑色の何かでしょうか。それがドローバーです。醜いそのものがツァー・ケージを包囲しています。」

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel verzieht sein Gesicht zu einem raubtierhaften Grinsen.{/n} "Eine riesige verwachsene Ranke? Das war der Treiber. Das verfluchte Ding, das den ganzen Käfig belagert."
languages.original_text: {n}A predatory grin cracks across the Colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel verzieht sein Gesicht zu einem raubtierhaften Grinsen.{/n} "Eine riesige verwachsene Ranke? Das war der Treiber. Das verfluchte Ding, das den ganzen Käfig belagert."

languages.text: {n}Un rictus carnassier anime les traits grossiers du colonel.{/n} « Une sorte de plante grimpante démesurée ? C'est le Chasseur. Cette saleté assiège l'ensemble de la Cage. »
languages.original_text: {n}A predatory grin cracks across the Colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un rictus carnassier anime les traits grossiers du colonel.{/n} « Une sorte de plante grimpante démesurée ? C'est le Chasseur. Cette saleté assiège l'ensemble de la Cage. »

languages.text: {n}Una sonrisa depredadora aflora en la cara del coronel.{/n} «¿Una especie de liana excesivamente grande? Eso era el Pastor. Esa abominación está asediando la Jaula».
languages.original_text: {n}A predatory grin cracks across the Colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."

traits.locale_text: {n}Una sonrisa depredadora aflora en la cara del coronel.{/n} «¿Una especie de liana excesivamente grande? Eso era el Pastor. Esa abominación está asediando la Jaula».

languages.text: {n}Albay'ın ağır hatlarına yırtıcı bir sırıtış beliriyor.{/n} "Bir tür devasa, aşırı büyümüş asma mı? Çoban o. İğrenç şey, tüm Kafes'i kuşatmış vaziyette."
languages.original_text: {n}A predatory grin cracks across the Colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay'ın ağır hatlarına yırtıcı bir sırıtış beliriyor.{/n} "Bir tür devasa, aşırı büyümüş asma mı? Çoban o. İğrenç şey, tüm Kafes'i kuşatmış vaziyette."

languages.text: {n}上校粗犷的脸上绽开一道捕食者般的笑容。{/n}“是那种巨大、疯长的藤蔓吧？那是拒生花。那鬼东西把整个牢笼都围死了。”
languages.original_text: {n}A predatory grin cracks across the Colonel's heavy features.{/n} "Some sort of huge, overgrown vine? That was the Drover. That vile thing has the whole Cage under siege."
